sentence: 爷爷曾经住在人民公社里。
pinyin: Yéye céngjīng zhù zài rénmín gōngshè lǐ.
english: Grandpa used to live in a people's commune.

sentence: 这条路的总长是五十公里。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù de zǒngcháng shì wǔshí gōnglǐ.
english: The total length of this road is fifty kilometers.

sentence: 请把这段文本复制到表格里。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhè duàn wénběn fùzhì dào biǎogé lǐ.
english: Please copy this text into the form.

sentence: 超市在火车站以南两公里处。
pinyin: Chāoshì zài huǒchēzhàn yǐnán liǎng gōnglǐ chù.
english: The supermarket is two kilometers to the south of the train station.

sentence: 这两个学派的观点完全不同。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng gè xuépài de guāndiǎn wánquán bùtóng.
english: The views of these two schools of thought are completely different.

sentence: 民国初年颁布了《临时约法》。
pinyin: Línguó chūnián bānbùle 《Línshí Yuēfǎ》.
english: In the early years of the Republic, the Provisional Constitution (临时约法) was promulgated.

meaning: to write (used before or after a quoted passage)
sentence: 他在日记里写道，那天是他最开心的一天。
pinyin: Tā zài rìjì lǐ xiě dào, nà tiān shì tā zuì kāixīn de yī tiān.
english: He wrote in his diary that that day was the happiest day of his life.

meaning: a working group; a task force
sentence: 镇上派了一支工作队来帮助受灾的村民。
pinyin: Zhèn shàng pài le yī zhī gōngzuòduì lái bāngzhù shòuzāi de cūnmín.
english: The town sent a task force to help the villagers affected by the disaster.

meaning: the rules and discipline that apply within a family; stick used for pu
sentence: 爷爷说他小时候犯错是要受家法处置的。
pinyin: Yéye shuō tā xiǎoshíhòu fàncuò shì yào shòu jiāfǎ chǔzhì de.
english: Grandpa said that when he was young, making mistakes meant being punished under family rules.

sentence: 他把喜糖分送给了办公室里的每个同事。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xǐtáng fēn sòng gěi le bàngōngshì lǐ de měi gè tóngshì.
english: He handed out wedding candy to every colleague in the office.

sentence: 这几年城里的房价涨了不少。
pinyin: Zhè jǐ nián chéng lǐ de fángjià zhǎng le bùshǎo.
english: House prices in the city have risen quite a bit in the past few years.

sentence: 我下班后直接去超市买菜。
pinyin: Wǒ xià bān hòu zhíjiē qù chāoshì mǎi cài.
english: I go straight to the supermarket to buy groceries after getting off work.

sentence: 医生发现他体内有一个良性肿瘤。
pinyin: Yī shēng fā xiàn tā tǐ nèi yǒu yī gè liáng xìng zhǒng liú.
english: The doctor found a benign tumor inside his body.

sentence: 她加入了志愿者的行列。
pinyin: Tā jiārù le zhìyuànzhě de hángliè.
english: She joined the ranks of volunteers.

sentence: 港口停着许多大型船舶。
pinyin: Gǎngkǒu tíng zhe xǔduō dàxíng chuánbó.
english: Many large ships are docked at the port.

meaning: 1. to travel along a route (of vehicles etc)
sentence: 公交车在快车道上行驶。
pinyin: Gōngjiāochē zài kuàichēdào shàng xíngshǐ.
english: The bus was traveling in the fast lane.

sentence: 黄河沿岸的城市越来越多。
pinyin: Huáng Hé yán àn de chéng shì yuè lái yuè duō.
english: There are more and more cities along the banks of the Yellow River.

sentence: 今天的猪肉比平时便宜一些。
pinyin: Jīntiān de zhūròu bǐ píngshí piányí yīxiē.
english: Today's pork is a bit cheaper than usual.

sentence: 孩子们喜欢用彩色铅笔画画。
pinyin: Háizimen xǐhuān yòng cǎisè qiānbǐ huà huà.
english: Children love to draw with colored pencils.

sentence: 本届运动会共有三十个国家参加。
pinyin: Běn jiè yùndònghuì gòng yǒu sānshí gè guójiā cānjiā.
english: This year's games have thirty countries participating.

sentence: 网络中有一个节点出现了故障。
pinyin: Wǎngluò zhōng yǒu yī gè jiédiǎn chūxiànle gùzhàng.
english: One node in the network has failed.

meaning: 1. perianth (common term for calyx and corolla); 2. border and protect
sentence: 这朵花的花被颜色非常鲜艳。
pinyin: Zhè duǒ huā de huābèi yánsè fēicháng xiānyàn.
english: The perianth of this flower is very brightly colored.

sentence: 他每年都去广州参加交易会。
pinyin: Tā měi nián dōu qù Guǎngzhōu cānjiā jiāoyìhuì.
english: He goes to Guangzhou every year to attend the trade fair.

sentence: 美国国务卿今天访问了北京。
pinyin: Měiguó guówùqīng jīntiān fǎngwènle Běijīng.
english: The U.S. Secretary of State visited Beijing today.

sentence: 他从农村搬到了附近的县城。
pinyin: Tā cóng nóngcūn bāndàole fùjìn de xiànchéng.
english: He moved from the countryside to the nearby county town.

sentence: 历史上每一位改革者都面临过很大的阻力。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shàng měi yī wèi gǎigézhě dōu miànlín guò hěn dà de zǔlì.
english: Every reformer in history has faced tremendous resistance.

meaning: easy to do; easy to manage
sentence: 有你帮忙，这件事就好办多了。
pinyin: Yǒu nǐ bāngmáng, zhè jiàn shì jiù hǎo bàn duō le.
english: With your help, this matter is much easier to handle.

meaning: how old?; how big?; how much?; so big; that much
sentence: 你家孩子多大了？看起来好可爱。
pinyin: Nǐ jiā háizi duō dà le? Kànqǐlái hǎo kě'ài.
english: How old is your child? They look so cute.

sentence: 政府出台政策调控房价过快上涨。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ chūtái zhèngcè tiáo kòng fángjià guò kuài shàngzhǎng.
english: The government introduced policies to regulate the rapid rise in housing prices.

meaning: 1. satellite TV (abbr. for 衛星電視|卫星电视[wèi xīng diàn shì])
sentence: 这档综艺节目在湖南卫视播出，收视率很高。
pinyin: Zhè dàng zōngyì jiémù zài Húnán wèishì bōchū, shōushìlǜ hěn gāo.
english: This variety show airs on Hunan Satellite TV and has very high ratings.

sentence: 孩子每天早上都要看一集卡通才肯吃早饭。
pinyin: Háizi měitiān zǎoshang dōu yào kàn yī jí kǎtōng cái kěn chī zǎofàn.
english: The kid insists on watching one episode of cartoons every morning before eating breakfast.

sentence: 这次图书博览会吸引了来自全国的出版商。
pinyin: Zhè cì túshū bólǎnhuì xīyǐn le láizì quánguó de chūbǎnshāng.
english: This book fair attracted publishers from all over the country.

sentence: 学校开设了艾滋病预防课程。
pinyin: Xuéxiào kāishè le àizībìng yùfáng kèchéng.
english: The school set up a course on AIDS prevention.

sentence: 公司在上海设立了一个办事处。
pinyin: Gōngsī zài Shànghǎi shèlìle yī gè bànshìchù.
english: The company set up an office in Shanghai.

meaning: 1. to extend (a building, an airport runway etc)
sentence: 学校正在扩建图书馆，预计明年完工。
pinyin: Xuéxiào zhèngzài kuòjiàn túshūguǎn, yùjì míngnián wángōng.
english: The school is expanding the library, which is expected to be completed next year.

sentence: 他们当晚就把合同签好了。
pinyin: Tāmen dàngwǎn jiù bǎ hétong qiān hǎo le.
english: They signed the contract that same evening.

meaning: one head; a head full of sth; one end (of a stick); one side; headlong
sentence: 他一头扎进书堆里复习。
pinyin: Tā yī tóu zhā jìn shū duī lǐ fù xí.
english: He buried himself headlong in a pile of books to review.

sentence: 她和伴侣一起去旅游了。
pinyin: Tā hé bànlǚ yīqǐ qù lǚyóu le.
english: She went on a trip together with her partner.

sentence: 舞台上的灯光突然暗下来了。
pinyin: Wǔtái shàng de dēngguāng tūrán àn xiàlái le.
english: The stage lighting suddenly dimmed.

sentence: 这座城市的服务业发展很快。
pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì de fúwùyè fāzhǎn hěn kuài.
english: The service industry in this city is developing rapidly.

meaning: 1. successful candidate in the highest imperial civil service examinat
sentence: 他的曾祖父曾是清朝的进士。
pinyin: Tā de zēngzǔfù céng shì Qīngcháo de jìnshì.
english: His great-grandfather was a palace graduate during the Qing dynasty.

sentence: 他在民政局工作了十多年。
pinyin: Tā zài mínzhèng jú gōngzuò le shí duō nián.
english: He has worked at the civil affairs bureau for over ten years.

sentence: 他每天骑单车上下班。
pinyin: Tā měitiān qí dānchē shàngxiàbān.
english: He rides his bike to and from work every day.

sentence: 请先看一下这篇论文的摘要。
pinyin: Qǐng xiān kàn yīxià zhè piān lùnwén de zhāiyào.
english: Please take a look at the abstract of this paper first.

meaning: 1. in order to; 2. so as to
sentence: 他存了一些钱，用以备不时之需。
pinyin: Tā cúnle yīxiē qián, yòng yǐ bèi bùshí zhī xū.
english: He saved some money so as to be prepared for unexpected needs.

sentence: 神父每周日都会做弥撒。
pinyin: Shénfù měi zhōurì dōu huì zuò mísa.
english: The priest holds Mass every Sunday.

meaning: to adapt for use for another purpose
sentence: 这个容器原来装咖啡，现在转用来存茶叶。
pinyin: Zhège róngqì yuánlái zhuāng kāfēi, xiànzài zhuǎn yòng lái cún cháyè.
english: This container used to hold coffee; now it's been repurposed for storing tea leaves.

sentence: 找到一份称心的工作真的不容易。
pinyin: Zhǎodào yī fèn chènxīn de gōngzuò zhēn de bù róngyì.
english: It's really not easy to find a job that suits you perfectly.

sentence: 广场上有人在做行为艺术，围观的人很多。
pinyin: Guǎngchǎng shàng yǒu rén zài zuò xíngwéi yìshù, wéiguān de rén hěn duō.
english: Someone was doing a performance art piece in the square, and a large crowd gathered to watch.

sentence: 奶奶每天下午都喜欢听戏曲。
pinyin: Nǎinai měitiān xiàwǔ dōu xǐhuan tīng xìqǔ.
english: Grandma loves listening to Chinese opera every afternoon.
